description_long: This is a single, overripe banana with a pronounced curvature and a visibly mottled peel. The peel displays a mix of yellow and brown-black patches, with significant bruising and dark spots along its length. Both the stem and the tip are darkened, indicating age and handling. A commercial sticker is affixed to the side, partially wrinkled but still legible. The surface texture appears soft and slightly wrinkled, with some areas showing minor indentations. The banana's overall form is intact, with no visible tears or splits in the peel.
description: A heavily spotted, overripe banana with a darkened stem, brown-black bruising, and a commercial sticker on its side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the banana, with mottled yellow and brown-black peel and a visible sticker.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the stem and tip, with the sticker partially visible and the banana's width apparent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the sticker more clearly and the extent of dark bruising along the peel.
description_view_3: View from the tip, showing the rounded end and the curvature of the banana, with less of the sticker visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is heavily mottled with brown and black spots, showing significant bruising and some wrinkling. There are no visible tears or splits, and the surface appears soft and slightly indented in places.
